description_en: A monument, a pear tree (nashinoki) at Higashimine, designated as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1974-03-18. It is located at Higashimine 953-1.

name_en: Great Cedar of Komatsu Hachimangu Shrine
description_en: A monument, the great cedar (ōsugi) of Komatsu Hachimangu Shrine, designated as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 1980-06-01. It is located at Shimozu 4299-2.
A monument, an Edohigan cherry tree at Machigumi, designated as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 2000-03-01. It is located at Tsukiyono 406-1.

name_en: Clustered Cedars of Fuji Sengen Shrine
description_en: A monument, the clustered cedars (muresugi) of Fuji Sengen Shrine, designated as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 2003-07-14. It is located at Tanigawa 553.
A monument, the clustered cedars (muresugi) at Hachiman-sama, designated as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 2003-07-14. It is located within Tanigawa.
A monument, the clustered cedars (muresugi) of Yubara Shrine, designated as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 2003-07-14. It is located at Yubara 358.

name_en: Utsukushimatsu Pine of Fuse Inari Shrine
description_en: A monument, the utsukushimatsu pine of Fuse Inari Shrine, designated as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Minakami Town on 2009-06-04. It is located at Fuse 2013.
A sculpture, statues of the Nio guardian kings. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Chiyoda Town on 1984-09-11. It is located at Tokoji Temple in Kizaki.
A craft work, the temple bell (bonshō) of Horin-ji. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Chiyoda Town on 1988-01-30. It is located at Horin-ji in Shimpukuji.
A craft work, the temple bell (bonshō) of Koon-ji. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Chiyoda Town on 1988-01-30. It is located at Koon-ji in Akaiwa.
A painting depicting the White-Robed Kannon (Byakue Kannon). It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Chiyoda Town on 2022-03-23. It is located at Horin-ji in Shimpukuji.
A painting, a portrait of the Zen master Choon Zenji. It is a tangible cultural property, town-designated by Chiyoda Town on 2022-03-23. It is located at Horin-ji in Shimpukuji.
A monument, a podocarpus (maki) tree of Hosho-ji, designated as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Chiyoda Town on 2022-03-23. It is located at Hosho-ji in Setoi.
An intangible folk cultural property, the river segaki memorial rite of Akaiwa. It is town-designated by Chiyoda Town on 2022-03-23. It is held within Akaiwa.

name_en: Wood-Carved Fudo Myoo Statue of Kosho-ji
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a wood-carved statue of Fudo Myoo at Kosho-ji. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_romaji: Maeda Toshiie Nitta Rōbo Ate Shojō
name_en: Letter from Maeda Toshiie to His Elderly Mother in Nitta
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a letter from Maeda Toshiie addressed to his elderly mother in Nitta. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_en: Record of the Azuchi Religious Debate at Joun-ji
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a record of the Azuchi religious debate held at Joun-ji. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_en: Nitayama Pongee Order Document among the Hikobe Family Documents
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an order document for Nitayama pongee silk among the Hikobe family documents. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A tangible cultural property, a square pagoda (kakutō) at Tozen-ji. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
A tangible cultural property, a statue of the Jizo Bodhisattva at Sunaga. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

A tangible cultural property, a stone pillar lantern (sekidō) at Senju-ji. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

A tangible cultural property, a revolving sutra repository (rinzō) at Hosen-ji. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_romaji: Kamo Jinja Zuka Shutsudo no Kantō Tachi

description_en: A tangible cultural property, a ring-pommel sword (kantō tachi) excavated from the mound at Kamo Shrine. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.

name_romaji: Kyū Mohan Kōjō Kiryū Nenshi Gōshi Gaisha Jimushotō (Kennen Kinenkan)
name_en: Former Model Factory Kiryu Twisting Co. Office Building (Kennen Memorial Hall)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the office building of the former model factory Kiryu Twisting Limited Partnership Company, now the Kennen Memorial Hall. It is municipally designated by Kiryu City.
